overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character interacting with an NPC janitor in a space station corridor before walking down a warmly lit hallway. The environment features industrial piping, neon lighting strips, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station corridor with illuminated viewport

events.description: character turns away from NPC and begins walking down the corridor

agents.ego_description: standing and facing a janitor NPC holding a cleaning mop, engaged in dialogue near the viewport

notable_agents.action: janitor holding a mop, standing in front of the neon-framed viewport

entered.detail: large rectangular window with glowing warm neon border showing starfield outside
simple metal seating along the cream-colored corridor wall
exposed vertical piping and electrical conduits mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a warmly lit space station corridor facing a janitor NPC. A large neon-framed viewport dominates the background showing space outside, while industrial conduits run along the walls. The character appears to be in conversation before turning to leave.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with overlooking railing and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor away from the NPC, passing cleaning equipment and benches

entered.detail: metal safety railing overlooking a lower deck or open space below
janitor's trolley with cleaning supplies parked by the railing
exposed ventilation ducts and industrial pipes running along the ceiling
wall-mounted utility panels and horizontal piping
large white cylindrical planters with green foliage placed along the corridor
arched doorway at the end of the visible corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a long, warmly lit corridor with wooden flooring and industrial ceiling pipes. To the left, a metal railing overlooks a lower level where a cleaning cart sits, while benches and potted plants line the right wall. The character moves steadily forward through the quiet hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a personal interaction in a futuristic hub and transitions into a steady walk down a quiet, industrial corridor. It begins with the character facing a janitor NPC in a warmly lit space station area, where a large neon-framed viewport reveals the void of space beyond the industrial conduits. As the conversation ends, the camera follows the character as they turn away from the viewport and begin walking forward. The scene then shifts into a long hallway featuring wooden flooring and overhead piping, passing a metal railing that overlooks a cleaning cart on a lower level. The movement continues steadily past benches and potted plants lining the right wall, deepening the sense of immersion within the station's architecture.
